sentence: O ceo non esta claro nesta manhana.
ipa: o ˈt͡seo ˈnõ ˈes̺ta ˈklaɾo ˈnes̺ta maˈɲana
gloss_en: The sky is not clear this morning.
notes: Predorsal <c> before front vowel [t͡s] 'ceo' (4-way sibilant contrast) per maia1986; no vowel reduction, full unstressed vowels per penny2002.

sentence: Estes çapatos custan quarenta dineiros.
ipa: ˈes̺tes̺ t͡saˈpatos̺ kuˈs̺tɐ̃ kwaˈɾẽta diˈnejɾos̺
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty coins.
notes: Predorsal <ç> [t͡s] 'çapatos' per maia1986; retained <ei> 'dineiros' and nasal [ɐ̃] 'custan' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: La junta sera cras a las tres.
ipa: la ˈʒũta ˈs̺eɾa ˈkɾas̺ a ˈlas̺ ˈtɾes̺
gloss_en: The gathering will be tomorrow at three.
notes: Archaic 'cras' (< tomorrow) and feminine article 'la' per penny2002; apical coda [s̺] 'cras','las','tres' (no chiado) per maia1986.

sentence: O meu irmano vive cerca do rio.
ipa: o ˈmew iˈɾmano ˈvive ˈt͡seɾka ˈdo ˈrjo
gloss_en: My brother lives near the river.
notes: Intervocalic -n- preserved 'irmano' (defining Leonese retention) and /v/ surviving 'vive' (partial betacism) per maia1986; trill [r] 'rio' per penny2002.

sentence: Vai adeante e torce pela primeira carreira.
ipa: ˈvaj aˈðeɐ̃te ˈe ˈtoɾt͡se pela pɾiˈmejɾa kaˈrejɾa
gloss_en: Go forward and turn at the first road.
notes: Trill <rr> [r] 'carreira' and retained <ei> per maia1986; /v/ retained 'vai' per penny2002.

sentence: A sopa de peixe era mui saborosa.
ipa: a ˈs̺opa de ˈpejʃe ˈeɾa ˈmwi s̺aβoˈɾoz̺a
gloss_en: The fish soup was very tasty.
notes: <ei> diphthong 'peixe' and apical [s̺] onset/coda per maia1986; 'era ... a sopa' hiatus with full unstressed vowels per penny2002.

sentence: Onde tomo eu o caminho?
ipa: ˈõde ˈtomo ˈew o kaˈmiɲo
gloss_en: Where do I take the path?
notes: Palatal <nh> [ɲ] 'caminho' per maia1986; 'tomo eu o' vowel liaison and unreduced final [o] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Quantas pessoas veen aa cena?
ipa: ˈkwɐ̃tas̺ ˈpes̺oas̺ ˈveẽ ˈaa ˈt͡sena
gloss_en: How many people are coming to supper?
notes: Archaic hiatus 'veen' [veẽ] and crasis 'aa' per penny2002; predorsal <c> [t͡s] 'cena' per maia1986.

sentence: Se eu podesse, comprara aquela casa.
ipa: s̺e ˈew poˈðes̺e kõˈpɾaɾa aˈkela ˈkaz̺a
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Imperfect-subjunctive 'podesse' and conditional 'comprara' per penny2002; apical [s̺] and nasal [õ] 'comprara' per maia1986.

sentence: Comprei figos e berças na feira.
ipa: ˈkõpɾej ˈfiɣos̺ ˈe ˈbeɾt͡sas̺ na ˈfejɾa
gloss_en: I bought figs and greens at the fair.
notes: Retained <ei> 'comprei','feira' and F- preserved 'figos' [f] per maia1986; predorsal <ç>... 'berças' [t͡s] per penny2002.

sentence: Cras iremos de barco ata la ilha.
ipa: ˈkɾas̺ iˈɾemos̺ de ˈbaɾko ˈata la ˈiʎa
gloss_en: Tomorrow we will go by boat to the island.
notes: Archaic 'cras' and future 'iremos' per penny2002; palatal <lh> [ʎ] 'ilha' (hybrid Leonese/PT orthography) per maia1986.

sentence: Chama o moço quando chegares aa casa.
ipa: ˈtʃama o ˈmot͡so ˈkwɐ̃do tʃeˈɣaɾes̺ ˈaa ˈkaz̺a
gloss_en: Call the boy when you get home.
notes: Affricate <ch> [t͡ʃ] 'chama','chegares' (Asturian-Leonese value, not PT [ʃ]) per maia1986; nasal [ɐ̃] 'quando' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Boa tarde, como vos vai a saude?
ipa: ˈboa ˈtaɾde ˈkomo vos̺ ˈvaj a ˈs̺awðe
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how does your health fare?
notes: Clitic address 'vos' and /v/ retained 'vos vai' (partial betacism) per penny2002; 'vai a saude' liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Mais val un passaro na mano que dous a voar.
ipa: ˈmajs̺ ˈval ũ paˈs̺aɾo na ˈmano ke ˈdows̺ a ˈvoaɾ
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Apocopated 'val', retained <ou> 'dous', /v/ 'voar' per penny2002; intervocalic -n- preserved 'mano' per maia1986.

sentence: O gato negro dorme cabo do lhume.
ipa: o ˈɡato ˈneɡɾo ˈdoɾme ˈkaβo ˈdo ˈʎume
gloss_en: The black cat sleeps by the fire.
notes: Palatal <lh> [ʎ] 'lhume' per maia1986; full unstressed vowels, no reduction ('gato','negro','dorme') per penny2002.

sentence: Aquel rato fugiu pera o buraco.
ipa: aˈkel ˈrato ˈfuʒju ˈpeɾa o buˈɾako
gloss_en: That mouse fled into the hole.
notes: Trill onset [r] 'rato' and archaic 'pera' (< para) per maia1986; 'fugiu ... o' junction per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Todo o mundo fala deste feito grande.
ipa: ˈtoðo o ˈmũdo ˈfala ˈdes̺te ˈfejto ˈɡɾɐ̃de
gloss_en: The whole world speaks of this great deed.
notes: /kt/>/it/ 'feito' [ejt] and nasal [ũ] 'mundo' per maia1986; 'todo o' vowel liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Era mui louco quando bevia.
ipa: ˈeɾa ˈmwi ˈlowko ˈkwɐ̃do ˈbevja
gloss_en: He was very mad when he drank.
notes: Retained <ou> 'louco' and /v/ retained 'bevia' (partial betacism) per penny2002; nasal [ɐ̃] 'quando' per maia1986.

sentence: La luz do sol reluz sobre las lhombas.
ipa: la ˈlud͡z ˈdo ˈs̺ol reˈlud͡z ˈs̺obɾe ˈlas̺ ˈʎõbas̺
gloss_en: The light of the sun shines over the hills.
notes: Coda /l/ 'sol' and trill onset [r] 'reluz' per maia1986; predorsal <z> = voiced affricate [d͡z] 'luz','reluz' (the /d͡z/ member of the 4-way sibilant contrast, parallel to <ç>=[t͡s], not deaffricated) per maia1986; palatal <lh> [ʎ] 'lhombas' per penny2002.

sentence: O muller colleu as flores no vale fondo.
ipa: o muˈʎeɾ ˈkoʎew ˈas̺ ˈfloɾes̺ ˈno ˈvale ˈfõdo
gloss_en: The woman gathered the flowers in the deep valley.
notes: Palatal <ll>/<lh> [ʎ] 'muller','colleu' and archaic hiatus 'colleu' per maia1986; F- preserved 'flores','fondo' per penny2002.
